---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
description: Suggest a new feature for IACP 3.0
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement", "priority:P1"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem Statement
<!-- Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe the problem -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe what you want to happen -->

## User Benefit
<!-- Explain how this feature will benefit users -->

## Alternative Solutions
<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request -->

## Technical Considerations

### Frontend Impact
<!-- What components would need to be created or modified? -->

### Backend Impact
<!-- What APIs or services would need to be created or modified? -->

### Database Impact
<!-- What schema changes would be needed? -->

### AI/ML Impact
<!-- Would this require new AI models or integration? -->

## Priority Justification
<!-- Why is this important? What value does it add? -->

## Success Metrics
<!-- How would you measure the success of this feature? -->

- Metric 1: [e.g., Reduce filing time by 50%]
- Metric 2: [e.g., Increase user satisfaction to 4.5/5]

## Related Issues
<!-- Link any related issues or discussions -->

- Related to: #[issue number]

---

**For Review:**
- [ ] Reviewed against product roadmap
- [ ] Technical feasibility assessed
- [ ] Priority assigned
